caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. He is gesturing with his hands and looking toward someone off-camera to his right. Behind him, white banners feature the words "GRIND HUSTLE" and stars, while a screen to his right displays "BOSS TALK 101". Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture slightly, leaning forward and adjusting his expression as he continues to speak. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
